tweet.text:
Long still paying & work is done until the next "elevator down" sell to trap bears again. 7527 was support given and #ES_F formed a shelf there. Flush and recovery was long trigger. Triggered 7:40AM. Targets were 7558, 7565, 7575, 7587 (all hit).

7604, 7620 next, then breakout

Today was a simple day & good illustration of how my edge works. 1) Price goes "elevator down" 2) The Failed Breakdown zone is planned - 7527 in this case. It sweeps, bears trapped, we long. 3) Targets given: 7558, 7565, 7575, 7587. All hit in #ES_F.

Work done. 7604, 7620 next

Most the good action done for now in #ES_F. 7575 to 7620 was the multi-day range. It broke down this morning. 7527 then became supports, and traps of that shelf trigger long. We triggered at 740AM. 

Todays targets were 7558 (hit), 7565 (hit), 7575. Recovery bottoms us to 7587+

Good follow through and there's 7558 1st target hit in #ES_F. The setup was the Failed Breakdown of 7527 which was a massive support shelf. We got it at 7:40Am. Targets today were 7558 (hit), 7565, 7575 (must must recover to bottom it out).

7527=support still, sell below

Last evening we finally broke down the multi-day range which was 7574 to 7620. First stop down was 7527 per yesterday's 4pm newsletter. We held it exact all night, then trapped below at 7:40AM to trigger long.

No change from 8am post. 7558, 7565, 7575 next. Bulls must recover 75 https://t.co/Fp8HJOeBHt

We finally got a little vol overnight. All week the  #ES_F range was 7574 (which paid us 5x) to 7620. Overnight, it finally lost. Per newsletter, traps of 7527 were buyable & we just got it

Plan: 7558, 7565, 7575 next (bulls must recover). 7527 (watch traps)=support. Sell below

As posted, we got our morning spike in volatility, now chop in #ES_F. Levels respecting perfectly. The range is 7574-77 to 7620. At 9:45AM, we held 7574 *exact* and rallied 23 points. Now back again, weaker this time.

7593, 7604, 7620 still above. 7565, 7558 if we can break down

We got our injection of volatility and now chop in #ES_F. Levels respecting perfectly. 7574-77 was support of a range with 7620 resistance. We sold to 7574 *exact* - longs triggered - and up we went. 7604, 7620 if ES wants more, then multi-day break.

Next dip is under 7574

Total technical precision today in #ES_F. 7574-77 to 7620 is the range as posted. We sold to 7574 *exact* and rallied nicely. Newsletter readers were given the specific long trigger for this level. Now, just ride runner, nothing to do.

7604, 7620 above, then breakout. Sell<74

We are getting today's small injection of volatility finally in #ES_F and the range continues to respect perfectly. 7620 resistance, 7574-77 support. We held 74-77 Monday, ran to 7620, now back to 7574-77

Watch reclaims of 7587 now to see 7604+. 7565, 7558 are below this shelf

The range continues to respect nicely as we setup multi-day trend. 7574-77 to 7620= the range in #ES_F.  We held 7575 on Monday, ran to 7620 target. 7604 was 1st support down to today, here now.

7587 (watch traps), 7574-77 below. 7632, 7643+ when we breakout the range

We remain in ultra low vol in #ES_F. As posted, the range is 7620 to  7574-77. Monday eve - per newsletter - we held 7575 & ran. Yesterday's target was 7620, we've flagged below all night

Plan: Ride your runner. 7632, 7643, 7652 when we break. 7604 (watch traps), 7587=supports

Big Picture View: This week #ES_F - 1st time since March - broke down a range with 7527 support & sold. Its yet to backtest

Plan Next Week: 7326=support. Must hold. 7410 recovery triggers up to 7458, 7508, 7527. Dip 1st there. Must recover to bottom

7326 fails, sell 7300, 7187 https://t.co/t15OVZY7Du

Today's dip was caused by the failure of a multi-day support shelf at 7527. It was support yesterday, failed this morning, backtested as resistance, and flushed. 7527 must recover to bottom out.

7474 recovery can start a pop up that direction. 7458, 7439 remain below now

Dip continues in #ES_F and today was all about 7527. Support yesterday, failed today to trigger downside. It then became resistance this morning. Sell targets were 7502 (hit), 7487 (hit), 7474 (hit).

7474 must reclaim to pop. 7458, 7439 below now. 7527 must recover to bottom

Volatility drying now as we enter the mid day chop in #ES_F. Levels continue to respect and its all about 7527. It was support yesterday, trapped, rallied to 7604+ target. Failed today & now resistance for the last hr.

Must recover to rally to 7538, 7549+. 7502, 7488, 7473 below

Decent volatility & levels respecting well - this market remains all about 7527. It was the trap here yesterday that got us long to 7604+. Today, we flushed it, and have spent the last 30mins backtesting.

7527 must reclaim to rally today to 7538, 7549+. 7502, 7488, 7473 below

Finally getting some volatility expansion in #ES_F (elevator down) which means we can start stalking trades again. 7527-7620 has been the range. Yesterday we trapped 27, got long, rallied to 7604+. Now sub 27 again

7527 must reclaim to rally to 7538, 7549. 7502, 7488, 7473 below

Low volatility again to start in #ES_F as we remain midrange. 7527 to 7620=the range. Yesterday, the trap of 7527 got us long for the last entry, and we ran to 7587, 7604+ targets.

7549 now support (watch traps), 7527 below which remains key (sell below). 7558, 7577+ upsides

Yesterday was simple in #ES_F as we work a new range. 7527 Failed Breakdown was long trigger given. We triggered 7:40AM. Targets were 7587 main (hit). Bonus were 7604 (hit), 7620. 7527-7620=the new range

Plan: 7549 (held), 7527 (watch traps)=supports. 7577, 7587, 7604 targets.
